title: Git MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Git MCP Server for Claude
Official MCP server providing Git repository tools for reading, searching, and manipulating Git repositories
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Anthropic
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `git` `version-control` `repositories` `official` `anthropic`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status git
```

## Config
```json
{
  "git": {
    "args": [
      "-y",
      "@modelcontextprotocol/server-git"
    ],
    "command": "npx"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status git

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/mcp/git-mcp-server
